label: Constraint propagation, logic & program execution

node.label: Constraint propagation, logic & program execution
node.definition: Explicit rules, solvers, interpreters, and executable programs enforce structure or perform exact computation.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Constraint propagation, logic & program execution is modeled as depending on Discrete mathematics & logic, Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations and feeding downstream nodes such as Expert systems, production rules & rule engines, Neuro-symbolic models, Probabilistic & differentiable programming.

limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Discrete mathematics & logic, Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations.
